text:
Clause's Father is a character exclusive to the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series, who lives in a village that the Elric brothers visit at the start of the anime during their flashback. He is the father of Clause.

Appearance

His most notable features are his squinty eyes not dissimilar to those of Vato Falman, only shown opening them when bearing witness to one of Majhal's living mannequins of Karin. He is a fairly tall man with short spiky black hair and wears a white dress shirt with a high standing collar and a black unbuttoned waistcoat.

Personality

He cares much for his youngest daughter Clause and is not above disciplining her for any mischief she and her friends may cause to their fellow villagers or outsiders. He also has respect for Majhal.
